narrative:
Concord Township has 22,212 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.4 percentage points.
